title: Taking the Star Ferry
description: Buy a ticket and board the Star Ferry across Victoria Harbour
location: Star Ferry Pier, Tsim Sha Tsui
context: The Star Ferry has crossed Victoria Harbour since 1888. It links Tsim Sha Tsui (Kowloon) to Central and Wan Chai on Hong Kong Island. The upper deck costs a little more but the view is one of the best in the world. Trips take about 8 minutes.
culturalFact: In 1966, a proposed Star Ferry fare increase of 5 cents triggered three days of riots in Kowloon — a sign of how central the ferry was to working-class daily life. The current fare is still among the cheapest harbour crossings of any major city.

lines.speaker: you
lines.jyutping: m4 goi1, heoi3 zung1 waan4 jiu3 gei2 do1 cin2?
lines.english: Excuse me, how much is it to Central?

lines.speaker: staff
lines.jyutping: soeng6 cang4 luk6 man1, haa6 cang4 ng5 man1.
lines.english: Upper deck six dollars, lower deck five dollars.

lines.speaker: you
lines.jyutping: jiu3 jat1 zoeng1 soeng6 cang4, do1 ze6.
lines.english: One upper deck ticket please, thank you.

lines.speaker: staff
lines.cjk: 呢係你張飛，下一班係十五分鐘後。
lines.jyutping: ni1 hai6 nei5 zoeng1 fei1, haa6 jat1 baan1 hai6 sap6 ng5 fan1 zung1 hau6.
lines.english: Here's your ticket, the next departure is in fifteen minutes.

lines.speaker: staff
lines.cjk: 入閘之後，跟住個牌走就係㗎喇。
lines.jyutping: jap6 zaa3 zi1 hau6, gan1 zyu6 go3 paai4 zau2 zau6 hai6 ga3 laa3.
lines.english: After you go through the gate, just follow the signs.
